I'm Collins Okolo — writer, marketer, and filmmaker. I tell stories across mediums: through prose that lingers, campaigns that move people, and films that hold a mirror up to the human experience.

01 — About

The person
behind the work.

Hello, I'm Collins (Dubem).

I'm a multidisciplinary creative with a passion for storytelling in all its forms. Whether I'm crafting a long-form essay, building a marketing strategy, or working on set — I bring the same obsessive attention to detail and love for the human element.

My work lives at the intersection of art and impact. I believe great creative work doesn't just look good — it changes minds, sparks conversations, and builds lasting connections with audiences.

Based in Lagos, Nigeria. Open to freelance, collaborations, and full-time opportunities.

4+
Years of Experience

Creative Disciplines
02 — Writing

Stories worth
reading.

Deeds Magazine
Music / Culture
"Lapopiano & Nepopiano: How Nigeria's Class Conversation Found Its Way Into the Music"

For months Nigerian social media has been locked in a loud debate about privilege, access, and survival. Collins traces how the Nepo vs. Lapo Baby conversation stopped being about people — and started shaping an entire sound.

Read piece →
Deeds Magazine
Film / Culture
"Sundance and the New Wave from Africa"

Among nearly 100 features in Sundance's lineup, three projects from Africa stood out. An essay on what their presence signals for the continent's growing foothold in international cinema.

Read piece →
Deeds Magazine
Music / Feature
"Top 100 Afrobeats Songs of All Time"

A deeply personal list where each selection carries a memory, a moment, or a movement. Afrobeats as autobiography — one track at a time, from 2Baba to Rema.

Read piece →
Deeds Magazine
Music / Culture
"Tems is Cultivating Queens: 72 Hours in Lagos and the Rise of A New Wave of Women Producers"

Lagos has a way of telling you exactly where the future is being made. An immersive dispatch from Tems' Leading Vibe Initiative — tracing the emergence of a new generation of women producers reshaping the sound of Afrobeats from behind the boards.

Read piece →
Substack
Personal Essay
"The problem with my hair is not my hair."

A meditation on identity and freedom — what it means to wear your hair as a political act, and why people feel so entitled to question it. Almost four years of locs, and the questions keep coming.

Read piece →
Substack
Philosophy / Reflection
"CARPE DIEM"

We are always elsewhere — leaning into the future or looking back at the past, while the present slips by unnoticed. A search for the only place where life actually takes place.

Read piece →
Substack
Personal Essay
"The Weight of a Question"

The quiet crisis of becoming — what happens when routine sets in and "is this all I'm meant to do?" refuses to leave. An honest look at ambition, stagnation, and the hunger for more.

Read piece →
Medium
Philosophy
"AD QUAESTIONEM"

A philosophical inquiry that begins with the kind of question only a child dares to ask — and follows it further than most adults are willing to go.

Read piece →
Medium
Personal Finance
"PENNY WISE, POUND FOOLISH"

The first attempt at saving money — and everything that went wrong. A personal account of small victories, big blind spots, and the gap between knowing and doing.

Read piece →
03 — Marketing

Copy that moves
people to act.

As a copywriter, scriptwriter, and occasional director, I've built video campaigns for real estate brand Terra Developers — shaping brand voice, narrative, and on-screen storytelling from brief to final cut.

Campaign 01Property Launch
"Live In The Most Strategically Located Waterfront Estate in Lekki"
Terra Developers · Nathan's Bay, Lakowe · 2024

A 84-second property launch campaign for Nathan's Bay — a waterfront estate in Lakowe, Lagos. Scripted the narrative and copy to drive urgency around land acquisition, reaching over 77,000 views.

CopywriterScriptwriter
Watch →
Campaign 02Seasonal Campaign
"Why Give Roses When You Can Give Keys?"
Terra Developers · Hearts & Home Promo · 2024

A Valentine's Day campaign following two lovers navigating eviction threats in Lagos, finding hope through Terra's Hearts & Home promo. Wrote the script and shaped the emotional arc — storytelling as sales strategy.

ScriptwriterDirector
Watch →
Campaign 03Brand Content
"Final Construction Update Across All Projects — 2023"
Terra Developers · Year-End Review · 2023

A comprehensive visual year-in-review across all Terra projects — from blueprints to reality. Scripted the narrative to celebrate milestones, build investor trust, and carry audiences through a full year of progress.

ScriptwriterCopywriter
Watch →
Campaign 04Brand Content
"Residential Party vs Investors Party — October Construction Update"
Terra Developers · Nine Projects · 2024

A playful debate-format campaign pitting residential buyers against investors across nine Terra projects in Lagos and Abuja. Conceived the creative concept, wrote the script, and brought two characters — Madam Cherry and Sir Manuel — to life.

ConceptScriptwriterDirector
Watch →
INERTIA
Meji · Release Teaser
View on Instagram
Campaign 05Music · Pre-Roll Ad
"INERTIA" — Release Date Teaser
Meji (@Mejiistheone) · Single Campaign · 2025

A pre-roll ad teasing the release of Meji's single "INERTIA." Wrote the script and co-directed — building anticipation through tight copy and visual pacing designed to stop the scroll and hold attention in the first three seconds.

ScriptwriterCo-Director
Watch on IG →
04 — Film

Moving images,
lasting feelings.

Short Film · BTS · 2026
"Hear Me"

After a night out, Sorochi and Kunle return home to laughter that soon unravels into confrontation. As their neighbors argue next door, they're forced to face the silence and miscommunication tearing them apart — proving love alone may not be enough.

7 min 32 secDramaBTSThe Trybe
Watch on YouTube
Music Visualizer · 2024
"Miss You" — BinaTheFirst ft. Izö

A heartfelt official visualizer for BinaTheFirst's "Miss You" — a track that captures the texture of longing and love. Directed and edited from concept to delivery, shaping the visual language to mirror the emotional weight of the music.

Music VisualizerBinaTheFirstDirector · Editor2024
